name: react
description: The library for web and native user interfaces.
summary: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces. It uses a component-based model and a virtual DOM for efficient updates.
explanation: The repo is a monorepo with packages/react (core), packages/react-dom (DOM renderer), and packages/scheduler. Entry points are in packages/react and packages/react-dom. Build and test scripts live in scripts/.
learningPath: Read packages/react/src/React.js for the core API
Check packages/scheduler for the concurrent scheduler
